title: FusFault
description: A default edit I created with various changes. Some changes include blocks, item textures, and Crystal PvP changes.
body: This texture pack includes many changes including the inventory, item look, block look, etc. The tools were made to look like lighter similiar to the old xbox 360 look. Other changes were made to particles, totem pop, and more. This pack personally helped me in my earlier days of PVP.
